## What does this PR do?

<!-- A clear description of the change and the motivation (the "why"). -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated and `npx vitest run` passes (and `pytest` if `server/` changed)
- [ ] UI changes verified in a real browser
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `docs/`) if behavior or setup changed
